reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the state with the 24th-highest average gasoline tax rate across MMFR years 2013-2023, excluding DC and Federal Tax.
2. Using the city reference for that state's southern-tip metropolis, determine the most populous city located at the southern tip of that state.

3. For each school progress report year from 2006-2007, 2007-2008, 2008-2009, and 2009-2010, identify the top five elementary schools in that city by environment category rating, applying the source task's deterministic school-name tie-break only if needed.
4. From the four yearly top-five lists, keep the schools that appear in at least three years.
5. Using the 2013-14 school locations data, keep the school from step 4 that is in the Bedford Neighborhood Tabulation Area.
6. Using that school's reference page, return its school day in MM/DD format.
original_final_question: First find the state with the 24th-highest average gasoline tax rate (excluding DC and Federal Tax) across MMFR years 2013-2023, then identify the most populous city located at its southern tip. In that city, find the elementary school that appears in the top 5 by environment category rating in at least three years from 2006-2010 and is located in the Bedford Neighborhood Tabulation Area. Please report the school day in the MM/DD format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: State with 24th-highest average gasoline tax rate (2013-2023) -> New York
Node 2: Most populous city at southern tip of New York -> New York City
Result: New York City identified as the target city

Node 3: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2006-07 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) -> {PS 034 OLIVER H PERRY, EARTH SCHOOL, PS 212 MIDTOWN WEST, PS 205 ALEXANDER GRAHAM BELL, PS 120 CARLOS TAPIA}

Node 4: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2007-08 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) -> {P.S. 380 JOHN WAYNE ELEMENTARY, P.S. 172 BEACON SCHOOL OF EXCELLENCE, P.S. 120 CARLOS TAPIA, EXCELLENCE CHARTER SCHOOL OF BEDFORD STUYVESANT, P.S. 164 CAESAR RODNEY}

Node 5: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2008-09 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) -> {P.S. X307 - EAMES PLACE, P.S. 380 JOHN WAYNE ELEMENTARY, P.S. 254, P.S. 172 BEACON SCHOOL OF EXCELLENCE, P.S. 157 BENJAMIN FRANKLIN}

Node 6: Top 5 elementary schools by environment score in 2009-10 (tie-break by SCHOOL name Z-A) -> {P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary, P.S. 172 Beacon School of Excellence, Achievement First East New York School, Bronx Charter School for Excellence, P.S. 254}
Node 7: Schools appearing in top-5 lists in at least three of the four years -> {P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary, P.S. 172 Beacon School of Excellence}
Node 8: From node 7, select the school located in the Bedford NTA -> P.S. 380 John Wayne Elementary
Node 9: John Wayne Elementary School Day is on October 28
